title: Transportation Tech Tree
description: Investment in transportation technology and upgrades: better spokes for wheels, breeding faster horses, different caravan hulls to discourage robbery. These upgrades improve route efficiency, speed, and security.
definition-of-done: Tech tree for transportation upgrades. Each upgrade provides measurable benefit. Upgrades require investment and time. Tech tree visible and navigable.
testing-plan: Verify tech tree displays correctly. Test upgrade purchase and effects. Verify prerequisites enforced. Test upgrade benefits apply.
